creator: kirillrdy@gmail.com
text:
all versions updated eg 10.9,11.4 ( and other currently supported version)
have a serious regression in ALTER TABLE TYPE
We found out because our CI is running docker got updated

There is a fix upstream
Sorry if I am not allowed to link to github,
https://github.com/postgres/postgres/commit/f946a409143d01951411382fbc3c91c7eb640094

Just hope this saves someone time :-)
